overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a fedora and leather jacket exploring a Mediterranean coastal harbor at sunset. The character walks along stone paths and wooden docks, passing vintage vehicles, sandbag barricades, and moored sailboats, with limestone cliffs and historic buildings surrounding the harbor.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside road with harbor view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone coastal path with the cliff face on the left and the sea on the right, approaching the harbor

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff wall with sparse vegetation rising on the left side of the path
old-fashioned military-style truck parked on the side of the road
metal chain link fence with wooden posts separating the path from the water
tall two-masted sailing ship anchored in the harbor with sails furled

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone coastal road at golden hour, with a steep rocky cliff on the left and the calm sea on the right. A vintage truck is parked by the roadside, and in the distance, a large sailing ship is visible in the harbor beyond the chain fence.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor supply area with military barricades

events.description: moving from narrow cliffside path into wider harbor area with sandbag barricades and military equipment

agents.ego_description: walking past sandbag barricades and vintage military vehicles along the waterfront promenade

notable_agents.action: man in dark clothing walking along the path in the opposite direction

entered.detail: stacked military sandbags forming a defensive barrier along the roadside
olive green antique truck with canvas cover parked near the sandbags
stacked wooden pallets and shipping materials near the vehicles
cluster of historic stone buildings and warehouses along the distant shoreline

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider harbor area with military sandbag barricades and vintage vehicles parked along the cobblestone road. The character passes a pedestrian while the large schooner remains visible in the distance, and stone buildings appear across the harbor.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing pier with moored boats

events.description: stepping from stone cobblestones onto wooden dock planks extending over the water
pausing at the end of the pier to look out at the anchored sailing ship before turning

agents.ego_description: walking along the weathered wooden pier toward the moored sailboat, observing the harbor and passing fishermen

notable_agents.action: man in striped shirt and cap standing on the dock looking out at the water
fisherman working near the small boats moored at the pier

entered.detail: weathered wooden pier extending over the calm harbor water
small wooden rowboats tied up alongside the dock
distant island with a tall lighthouse visible through the haze
vertical wooden posts in the water used for tying boats

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a wooden fishing pier extending into the harbor, passing small moored boats and fishermen. The large schooner dominates the view ahead while a distant lighthouse is visible on the horizon. The character pauses at the pier's end to observe the sailing ship.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic harbor front with stone warehouses

events.description: turning around and walking back from the pier end toward the town buildings along a different dock
approaching stone archway and stairs leading up from the dock into the coastal town

agents.ego_description: walking back along the dock toward the stone buildings, passing cargo and workers, heading toward the town entrance

notable_agents.action: man in flat cap walking ahead toward the stone archway entrance

entered.detail: cluster of historic limestone buildings with shuttered windows built into the cliffside
large stone archway forming an entrance into the town with stairs leading upward
large wooden cargo barrel sitting on the dock planks
piles of wooden shipping crates and boxes along the dockside

segments.scene_description: The character walks back along the dock toward the town, passing wooden barrels and cargo crates. The historic stone buildings of the coastal village rise ahead, built into the rocky hillside. The character approaches a stone archway entrance with stairs leading up into the town, following a local resident.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow coastal road into the heart of a bustling Mediterranean harbor and back toward a hillside village. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone path between a steep rocky cliff and the calm sea, passing a vintage truck as a large sailing ship appears in the distance. As the road opens into a wider harbor area, the camera moves past military sandbag barricades and parked vintage vehicles toward a cluster of stone buildings. The scene then shifts as the character steps onto a wooden fishing pier, passing moored boats and fishermen before pausing at the pier's end to face the dominating schooner and a distant lighthouse. Finally, the camera turns back toward the town, gliding past wooden barrels and cargo crates toward a stone archway and stairs that lead up into the historic village built into the hillside.
